articles.title: Claude Sonnet 5发布，更便宜更强
articles.summary: Anthropic推出Claude Sonnet 5，价格更低、智能体能力更强，比Opus和GPT-5.5更划算。
articles.why: 对想用AI工具但预算有限的新手来说，这是目前性价比最高的模型之一。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 关注Sonnet 5的定价和功能，适合日常写作、翻译和编程辅助。
articles.for_me: 你学英语和备考AI时，可以用它做翻译、写论文摘要或练口语，比GPT便宜，值得试试。

articles.title: OpenClaw手机版上线，免费AI助手
articles.summary: 开源AI程序OpenClaw终于登陆安卓和iOS，手机就能用，完全免费。
articles.why: 手机端免费AI工具普及，让新手零门槛体验智能体功能。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 下载OpenClaw试试，它能在手机上帮你自动完成一些任务。
articles.for_me: 你平时用手机多，这个免费工具可以帮你练习用AI处理日常事务，比如整理笔记或查资料。

articles.title: Google推出更快更便宜的图像生成器
articles.summary: Google更新图像生成器Nano Banana 2 Lite，速度更快、成本更低，适合创作者。
articles.why: 图像生成门槛降低，普通用户也能低成本做AI配图。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 想学AI绘画的新手，可以关注这个工具，上手简单。
articles.for_me: 你学英语时可以用它生成学习卡片插图或海报，比之前便宜，值得一试。

articles.title: Claude Science发布，专攻科研
articles.summary: Anthropic推出Claude Science，能自主完成科学实验和数据分析，类似Claude Code。
articles.why: AI从写代码扩展到做科研，未来可能改变学术研究方式。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 了解AI在科研中的应用，对你备考AI方向有帮助。
articles.for_me: 你备考AI研究生时，可以关注这类工具如何辅助研究，未来写论文或做实验可能用得上。

articles.title: Google NotebookLM新增短视频摘要
articles.summary: NotebookLM现在能生成60秒竖屏AI视频，帮你快速了解笔记内容。
articles.why: 学习工具更直观，适合用碎片时间复习。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 试试用NotebookLM整理学习资料，生成视频摘要。
articles.for_me: 你学英语时，可以把课文或笔记上传，让它生成短视频帮你复习，比看文字更轻松。

articles.title: Tidal禁止AI音乐赚钱，但不禁用
articles.summary: Tidal从7月15日起不再给纯AI音乐付版税，但会标注出来供听众识别。
articles.why: 音乐平台对AI内容的态度分化，影响创作者收益。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 如果你用AI生成音乐，注意平台规则变化。
articles.for_me: 你学英语时可能用AI生成背景音乐或播客，但别指望靠它赚钱，平台已经收紧政策。

articles.title: Netflix用AI生成已故演员声音
articles.summary: Netflix在真人秀中用AI复刻Gene Wilder的声音，引发争议。
articles.why: AI复刻名人声音进入主流娱乐，涉及伦理和法律问题。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 关注AI在娱乐中的伦理边界，比如声音版权。
articles.for_me: 你学英语时可能用到AI配音工具，但要注意版权问题，别随便复刻他人声音。

articles.title: OpenAI将发布Codex硬件设备
articles.summary: OpenAI预告7月15日推出与编程工具Codex相关的硬件，形状像方块带按钮。
articles.why: AI从软件走向硬件，可能改变人机交互方式。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 留意AI硬件趋势，未来可能影响你使用AI的方式。
articles.for_me: 你备考AI方向时，可以关注AI硬件的发展，这是行业新方向，面试可能被问到。

articles.title: AI智能体不是你的同事
articles.summary: MIT评论文章指出，公司把AI工具当“同事”可能误导员工，AI只是工具。
articles.why: 帮助新手正确理解AI的定位，避免被炒作带偏。
articles.beginner_takeaway: AI是辅助工具，不是人类同事，别对它有过高期待。
articles.for_me: 你学英语时可以把AI当练习伙伴，但别把它当真人，保持批判性思维。

articles.title: AI芯片公司Etched估值50亿美元
articles.summary: 英伟达竞争对手Etched已获10亿美元订单，AI芯片市场持续火热。
articles.why: AI硬件竞争加剧，可能降低未来AI使用成本。
articles.beginner_takeaway: 关注AI芯片新闻，它影响你用的AI工具价格和速度。
articles.for_me: 你备考AI方向时，了解芯片竞争有助于理解行业格局，但暂时不用深入研究。

plain_summary: 今天AI圈挺热闹，几个重点值得你留意：第一，Anthropic出了Claude Sonnet 5，更便宜还更强，你学英语或备考AI都可以试试，比GPT划算。第二，OpenClaw手机版免费上线，手机就能用AI，零门槛。第三，Google的NotebookLM现在能生成短视频摘要，复习笔记更直观。另外，Tidal不让AI音乐赚钱了，Netflix用AI复刻已故演员声音引发争议——这些事提醒你，用AI时要注意版权和伦理。最后，AI芯片公司Etched拿到大订单，说明硬件竞争在加速，未来AI工具可能更便宜。整体看，今天没有颠覆性新闻，但新工具和规则变化值得跟住。

top_starred.name: affaan-m/ECC
top_starred.desc: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
top_starred.tagline: AI代理性能优化系统，提升智能体效率
top_starred.explanation: 这个项目是一个为AI代理（比如Claude Code、Codex等）设计的性能优化系统。它通过技能、本能、记忆、安全和研究优先的开发方法，让AI代理运行得更快、更聪明。简单说，如果你在用AI编程助手或智能体，这个工具能帮它们更好地记住上下文、做出更安全的决策。普通人可能用不上，但如果你是开发者，想优化自己搭建的AI代理，这个项目很有用。上手需要一些编程基础，但文档应该会指导你如何集成。

top_starred.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
top_starred.desc: The agent that grows with you
top_starred.tagline: 能随着你成长而进化的AI代理
top_starred.explanation: 这个项目是一个AI代理，它会根据你的使用习惯和需求不断学习和适应，就像你的个人助手一样越来越懂你。它解决的是通用AI不够个性化的问题。比如，你可以用它来管理日程、自动回复邮件，或者帮你整理信息，它会逐渐了解你的偏好。适合想要一个能长期陪伴、越来越智能的AI助手的人。上手难度中等，需要一些配置，但基本功能可能开箱即用。

top_starred.name: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
top_starred.desc: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
top_starred.tagline: 让每个人都能用上AI的自动化工具
top_starred.explanation: AutoGPT是一个能自动完成复杂任务的AI工具。它就像一个超级智能助手，你告诉它一个目标（比如“帮我研究一下新能源车市场”），它就会自己分解任务、搜索信息、生成报告，甚至调用其他软件。对普通人来说，你可以用它自动写文章、做市场调研、管理社交媒体。它解决的是手动操作繁琐的问题。上手有一定难度，需要懂点编程或命令行，但社区有很多教程。

top_starred.name: ollama/ollama
top_starred.desc: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
top_starred.tagline: 一键运行多种大语言模型的本地工具
top_starred.explanation: Ollama让你能在自己的电脑上轻松运行各种AI大模型，比如DeepSeek、Qwen等。它解决的是使用AI模型需要联网、付费或复杂配置的问题。普通人可以下载后，像安装软件一样运行模型，然后通过聊天界面使用，完全离线、免费。比如，你可以用它写文案、翻译、编程辅助。上手非常简单，几乎零门槛，适合所有想本地使用AI的人。

top_starred.name: f/prompts.chat
top_starred.desc: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
top_starred.tagline: 社区驱动的ChatGPT提示词分享平台
top_starred.explanation: 这是一个收集和分享ChatGPT提示词（prompts）的网站。提示词就是你跟AI说的话，好的提示词能让AI给出更好的回答。它解决的是很多人不知道如何有效提问的问题。比如，你可以找到“写一封专业邮件”的提示词，直接复制使用。适合所有使用ChatGPT的人，尤其是新手。上手零难度，直接浏览网站复制即可，也可以自己贡献提示词。

trending.name: sums001/Windows-Copilot-API
trending.desc: Reverse engineered Windows Copilot into an OpenAI-compatible API. Access GPT-4 and GPT-5 models through a simple REST interface without API keys or billing.
trending.explanation: 这个项目通过逆向工程，把Windows Copilot变成了一个兼容OpenAI的API，让你可以免费调用GPT-4甚至GPT-5模型。它解决的是OpenAI API收费且需要申请的问题。开发者可以用它来搭建自己的AI应用，比如聊天机器人，而不用花钱。普通人可能用不上，但如果你会编程，可以省下不少费用。上手需要编程知识，但接口简单。

trending.name: shy3130/tickflow-stock-panel
trending.desc: 自托管、零运维的 A 股「选股 + 监控 + 回测」量化工作台 | 基于 TickFlow 数据 | LLM能力驱使策略定制+个股分析+复盘 | 自由接入第三方个性化扩展数据
trending.tagline: A股量化投资工作台，选股监控回测
trending.explanation: 这是一个专为A股投资者设计的量化分析工具，集成了选股、监控和回测功能。它利用TickFlow数据和AI能力，帮你制定策略、分析个股。比如，你可以设置条件自动筛选股票，或者用历史数据测试你的交易策略。适合对股票投资感兴趣、有一定技术基础的人。上手需要了解一些量化投资概念，但界面是中文的，相对友好。

trending.name: raiyanyahya/recall
trending.desc: Stop wasting tokens and re-explaining your project every session. Recall gives Claude Code durable memory — entirely offline.
trending.tagline: 给Claude Code的离线持久记忆
trending.explanation: 这个工具让Claude Code（一个AI编程助手）拥有长期记忆，不用每次重新解释项目背景。它解决的是AI对话中上下文丢失、浪费token（计费单位）的问题。比如，你昨天让Claude帮你写了一个函数，今天它还能记住并继续优化。适合频繁使用Claude Code的开发者。上手简单，安装后自动运行，完全离线，保护隐私。

trending.name: benchflow-ai/awesome-evals
trending.desc: A curated, non-BS library of the best resources for building and evaluating AI agents — papers, blogs, talks, tools, benchmarks. Maintained by BenchFlow.
trending.tagline: AI代理构建与评估的资源精选集
trending.explanation: 这是一个精心整理的资源列表，包含论文、博客、工具等，帮助你构建和评估AI代理。它解决的是AI领域信息杂乱、难以找到高质量资料的问题。比如，你想学习如何测试AI代理的性能，这里就有相关的论文和工具。适合AI研究人员、开发者或爱好者。上手零门槛，直接浏览链接即可，但需要一定的英文阅读能力。

trending.name: abundantbeing/hermes-browser-extension
trending.desc: Browser-native side panel for Hermes Agent — connect web context to your local Hermes runtime.
trending.tagline: 浏览器侧边栏连接Hermes AI代理
trending.explanation: 这是一个浏览器扩展，在侧边栏中集成Hermes Agent，让你能直接在网页上下达指令，AI会结合当前网页内容来响应。比如，你在看一篇新闻，可以问AI“总结一下”，它就会提取关键信息。解决的是AI与浏览器割裂的问题。适合经常需要从网页获取信息并希望AI辅助的人。上手简单，安装扩展即可使用。

spaces.name: Sneak-Moose/Pro-Realism-Edit-Studio
spaces.desc: Powerful image editing - supports one or two input images.
spaces.tagline: 用AI轻松编辑图片，支持单张或两张合成。
spaces.explanation: ①这是一个在线图片编辑工具，可以让你用文字描述来修改图片，比如把照片里的背景换成沙滩，或者把两张图合成一张。它解决的是普通人不会用Photoshop也能专业修图的问题。②比如你学英语时想做个单词卡片，可以上传一张猫的图片，输入“给猫戴个帽子”，AI就会自动生成新图。③上手非常简单，打开网页上传图片，输入文字描述，点击生成就行，完全不需要技术基础。

spaces.name: baidu/Unlimited-OCR
spaces.tagline: 无限次免费使用的文字识别工具。
spaces.explanation: ①这是一个OCR（光学字符识别）应用，能把图片里的文字提取出来变成可编辑的文本。比如你拍了一张英文菜单，它能识别出上面的单词。②学英语时，你可以用它把英文海报、书籍截图转成文字，方便复制到翻译软件或笔记里。比如拍下英语试卷的阅读理解，直接提取文字查单词。③上手零门槛，上传图片就能自动识别，而且不限次数，完全免费。

spaces.name: r3gm/wan2-2-fp8da-aoti-preview-2
spaces.desc: generate a video from an image with a text prompt
spaces.tagline: 根据图片和文字描述生成短视频。
spaces.explanation: ①这是一个AI视频生成工具，你提供一张图片和一段文字描述，它就能生成一个几秒钟的动态视频。比如你有一张风景照，输入“海浪拍打岩石”，AI会让画面动起来。②学英语时，你可以用它把单词卡片变成动态场景，比如上传“奔跑的狗”的图片，生成视频帮助记忆。③操作简单，上传图片、输入文字、点击生成，等待几十秒即可，适合新手体验AI视频创作。

spaces.name: webml-community/gemma-4-webgpu-kernels
spaces.tagline: 在浏览器里运行AI模型的技术演示。
spaces.explanation: ①这是一个技术展示页面，让你直接在浏览器里体验Google的Gemma 4模型，不需要安装任何软件。它利用WebGPU技术让AI在本地运行，保护隐私。②虽然普通人直接使用价值不大，但你可以打开页面看看AI在浏览器里实时生成文字的效果，感受AI的速度。比如输入“写一首关于春天的诗”，看它逐字出现。③需要一点好奇心，但操作就是打开网页、输入文字，适合想了解AI前沿技术的新手。

spaces.name: kulkas2pintu/wan555
spaces.desc: generate a video from an image with a text prompt
spaces.tagline: 从图片和文字生成动态视频的工具。
spaces.explanation: ①和第三个类似，这也是一个图生视频工具，输入一张图片和文字描述，AI会生成短视频。它解决的是普通人不会视频剪辑也能创作动态内容的问题。②比如你学英语时想制作一个“苹果从树上掉下来”的动画，上传苹果树图片，输入描述，就能得到视频辅助理解。③上手简单，上传图片、写文字、点生成，几分钟就能出结果，适合零基础体验AI视频生成。

models.name: baidu/Unlimited-OCR
models.tagline: 从图片中提取文字并理解内容的AI模型。
models.explanation: ①这是一个多模态AI模型，能同时处理图片和文字。它可以把图片里的文字识别出来，还能理解图片内容并回答相关问题。比如你拍一张路牌，它不仅能读出上面的字，还能告诉你这是什么意思。②学英语时，你可以用它分析英文海报，比如上传一张电影海报，问它“这部电影的主题是什么？”，它会结合图片和文字回答。③使用需要一点技巧，通常通过API或特定应用调用，但网上有免费试玩界面，适合想深入体验AI能力的学生。

models.name: empero-ai/Qwythos-9B-Claude-Mythos-5-1M-GGUF
models.tagline: 擅长创意写作和角色扮演的对话模型。
models.explanation: ①这是一个文本生成模型，专门优化了创意写作和角色扮演能力。它可以根据你的要求写故事、模拟对话，甚至扮演某个角色。比如你让它扮演莎士比亚，用古英语写一段台词。②学英语时，你可以让它扮演英语老师，和你进行口语对话练习，或者让它写一篇英语短文供你学习。③使用需要找到部署它的网站或应用，通常有聊天界面，输入问题即可，适合想用AI练口语或学写作的新手。

models.name: zai-org/GLM-5.2
models.tagline: 能写文章、回答问题、翻译的通用AI。
models.explanation: ①这是一个文本生成模型，类似ChatGPT，可以写作文、回答问题、翻译、总结等。它解决的是需要文字处理的各种场景，比如写邮件、做笔记。②学英语时，你可以让它帮你翻译英文句子，或者让它用简单英语解释一个复杂概念。比如输入“用英语解释光合作用”，它会给出易懂的答案。③上手容易，很多网站提供免费试用，直接打字对话就行，适合零基础体验AI对话。

models.name: deepreinforce-ai/Ornith-1.0-35B-GGUF
models.tagline: 超大规模模型，擅长复杂推理和生成。
models.explanation: ①这是一个大型语言模型，有350亿参数，能处理更复杂的任务，比如写长文章、解数学题、编程。它解决的是需要深度思考的问题，比如分析数据或写论文。②学英语时，你可以让它帮你写一篇英语议论文，或者让它分析一篇英语新闻的论点。比如输入“写一篇关于AI对教育影响的英语短文”，它会生成结构完整的文章。③使用需要找到支持该模型的平台，通常有对话界面，适合想挑战高级AI功能的学生。

models.name: Qwen/Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B
models.tagline: 能自主完成多步骤任务的智能体模型。
models.explanation: ①这是一个智能体模型，不仅能聊天，还能自主执行多步骤任务，比如帮你订机票、查资料、写报告。它解决的是需要规划和执行复杂流程的问题。②学英语时，你可以让它帮你制定一个30天的英语学习计划，包括每天背单词、听听力、练口语的具体安排。比如输入“帮我制定一个提高英语口语的计划”，它会给出详细步骤。③使用需要一定的指令技巧，但很多平台提供引导，适合想探索AI自动化能力的新手。

items.title_en: Agentic Abstention: Do Agents Know When to Stop Instead of Act?
items.summary: LLM agents are expected to act over multiple turns, using search, browsing interfaces, and terminal tools to complete user goals. Yet not every goal is well specified or achievable in the available environment. In such cases, a reliable agent should recognize that further interaction is unlikely to help and abstain from additional tool calls. We define Agentic Abstention, the problem of deciding when an agent should stop acting under uncertainty. Unlike standard LLM abstention, which is usually
items.title_cn: 智能体自主中止：智能体何时该停止而非行动？
items.note: 研究智能体在不确定时是否应停止行动，对理解AI安全边界有帮助，新手可了解概念。

items.title_en: LiveEdit: Towards Real-Time Diffusion-Based Streaming Video Editing
items.summary: Streaming video editing has made rapid progress, yet practical deployment is still limited by two core issues: maintaining stable backgrounds and non-edited regions over time, and achieving the low latency required for real-time interactive scenarios. Meanwhile, recent streaming video generation methods are mostly developed for synthesis and cannot be directly applied to editing due to the strict preservation requirement and region-specific control. In this work, we present a novel streaming vid
items.title_cn: LiveEdit：迈向实时扩散式流视频编辑
items.note: 提出实时视频编辑方法，解决背景稳定和低延迟问题，适合关注视频生成技术的新手。

items.title_en: Scaling the Horizon, Not the Parameters: Reaching Trillion-Parameter Performance with a 35B Agent
items.summary: We introduce Agents-A1, a 35B Mixture-of-Experts Agentic Model that reaches trillion-parameter-level performance by scaling the agent horizon. We investigate agent-horizon scaling from two perspectives: scaling long-horizon trajectories and scaling heterogeneous agent abilities. To support this goal, we build a long-horizon knowledge-action infrastructure that connects external knowledge, actions, observations, and verifier outcomes, producing agentic trajectories with an average length of 45K t
items.title_cn: 扩展视野而非参数：35B智能体达到万亿参数性能
items.note: 通过扩展智能体行动序列而非模型大小提升性能，展示高效AI设计思路，值得关注。

items.title_en: TUA-Bench: A Benchmark for General-Purpose Terminal-Use Agents
items.summary: As large language models and harness frameworks continue to advance, agents operating in terminals are increasingly capable of performing a broader range of general computer-use tasks beyond coding. However, existing benchmarks do not adequately evaluate general-purpose terminal computer-use agents (TUAs): general computer-use benchmarks primarily target graphical user interfaces (GUIs), whereas terminal-based benchmarks largely emphasize technical and programming-centric workflows historically
items.title_cn: TUA-Bench：通用终端使用智能体基准测试
items.note: 评估终端智能体在通用计算机任务上的能力，对了解智能体应用场景有帮助。

items.title_en: ReFreeKV: Towards Threshold-Free KV Cache Compression
items.summary: To reduce memory consumption during LLM inference, a handful of methods have been proposed for KV cache pruning. While these techniques can accomplish lossless memory reduction on many datasets, they often hinge on an under-emphasized condition: an input/domain-specific threshold for KV cache budget needs to be pre-determined to achieve the optimal performance. However, such input-sensitive design may be considerably limited in real-world scenarios, as open-domain inputs span diverse domains, le
items.title_cn: ReFreeKV：迈向无阈值的KV缓存压缩
items.note: 提出无需预设阈值的KV缓存压缩方法，降低内存消耗，对理解大模型优化有参考价值。

items.title_en: Formalizing Latent Thoughts: Four Axioms of Thought Representation in LLMs
items.summary: We introduce an axiomatic evaluation framework for latent thought representations in LLMs, comprising metrics that are independent of downstream benchmark scores and reveal representational failures that benchmark accuracy masks. Existing evaluations conflate representation quality with model capacity. Therefore, failures cannot be attributed to the representation rather than to the model that processes it. We formalize four functional axioms (Causality, Minimality, Separability, and Stability)
items.title_cn: 形式化潜在思维：LLM中思维表示的四个公理
items.note: 提出评估LLM内部思维表示的公理框架，适合想深入理解模型推理机制的新手。

items.title_en: PhysisForcing: Physics Reinforced World Simulator for Robotic Manipulation
items.summary: Video generation models have emerged as a promising paradigm for embodied world simulation. However, both general-domain video generators and robot-specific data fine-tuned models can still produce physically implausible manipulations, including discontinuous motion trajectories and inconsistent robot-object interactions, which limits their reliability as world simulators. Through extensive experiments, we find that such physical instability mainly arises from two factors: deformation of moving
items.title_cn: PhysisForcing：用于机器人操作的物理增强世界模拟器
items.note: 通过物理约束改进视频生成模型，使机器人操作更真实，对机器人+AI交叉领域有兴趣可看。

items.title_en: Qwen-Image-2.0-RL Technical Report
items.summary: We present Qwen-Image-2.0-RL, a post-training pipeline that applies reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and on-policy distillation (OPD) to improve both the visual quality and instruction-following capability of the Qwen-Image-2.0 diffusion model. To provide reliable reward signals, we construct task-specific composite reward models by fine-tuning vision-language models with a pointwise scoring paradigm and chain-of-thought reasoning. For text-to-image generation, the reward models
items.title_cn: Qwen-Image-2.0-RL技术报告
items.note: 用强化学习提升图像生成模型质量，展示RL在视觉领域的应用，了解个大概即可。

items.title_en: Translation as a Bridging Action: Transferring Manipulation Skills from Humans to Robots
items.summary: We study whether we can learn novel manipulation skills from human actions to a bi-manual robot with parallel grippers. Human action data is cheap, abundant, and diverse, making it one of the most promising resources for scaling up robot learning. Yet transferring skills from humans to robots remains hard: most prior work treats humans as just another bi-manual 6DoF embodiment, where hand-pose estimates are noisy and the contact patterns of human fingers differ fundamentally from those of a para
items.title_cn: 翻译作为桥接动作：将操作技能从人类转移到机器人
items.note: 研究如何将人类动作数据用于训练机器人，对机器人学习感兴趣可关注。

items.title_en: Qwen-RobotManip Technical Report: Alignment Unlocks Scale for Robotic Manipulation Foundation Models
items.summary: Foundation models in language and multimodality achieve strong generalization by aligning heterogeneous data under a unified formulation and training at scale. In this report, we investigate whether this scaling recipe can be applied to robotic manipulation to achieve genuine generalization. This is challenging because, unlike text, manipulation data is heterogeneous by nature, expensive to collect, and narrow in diversity, making alignment and scale simultaneously difficult. We present Qwen-Rob
items.title_cn: Qwen-RobotManip技术报告：对齐解锁机器人操作基础模型的规模
items.note: 探索统一数据格式训练机器人操作模型，体现AI规模化思路，值得一看。

items.title_en: DanceOPD: On-Policy Generative Field Distillation
items.summary: Modern image generation demands a single model that unifies diverse capabilities, including text-to-image (T2I), local editing, and global editing. However, these capabilities are rarely naturally aligned and often conflict. For instance, editing tends to degrade T2I performance, while global and local editing interfere with each other. Consequently, effectively composing these capabilities has become a central challenge for image generation model training. To tackle this, we introduce DanceOPD,
items.title_cn: DanceOPD：在线策略生成场蒸馏
items.note: 解决图像生成模型中多种能力冲突的问题，对多任务学习感兴趣可了解。

items.title_en: In-Context World Modeling for Robotic Control
items.summary: Modern Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often fail to generalize to novel setups, such as altered camera viewpoints or robot morphologies, because they are typically conditioned only on current observations and language instructions. By ignoring the underlying system configuration as a variable, these models implicitly assume a fixed execution context encountered during training, necessitating data-intensive fine-tuning for any new environment. In this work, we introduce In-Context World Mode
items.title_cn: 上下文世界建模用于机器人控制
items.note: 让机器人通过上下文学习适应新环境，减少数据需求，对机器人泛化能力有帮助。

items.title_en: OPID: On-Policy Skill Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: Outcome-based reinforcement learning provides a stable optimization backbone for language agents, but its sparse trajectory-level rewards provide little guidance on which intermediate decisions should be reinforced or suppressed. On-policy self-distillation offers dense token-level supervision, yet existing skill-conditioned variants often rely on external skill memories or retrieved privileged context, which are costly to maintain and can be mismatched with the state distribution induced by the
items.title_cn: OPID：用于智能体强化学习的在线策略技能蒸馏
items.note: 通过技能蒸馏提升语言智能体学习效率，适合关注强化学习的新手。

items.title_en: Qwen-Image-Agent: Bridging the Context Gap in Real-World Image Generation
items.summary: While text-to-image (T2I) models have achieved remarkable progress, they struggle with real-world requests that are often underspecified, implicit, or dependent on up-to-date knowledge. We identify this challenge as the Context Gap: the mismatch between the user context and the sufficient generation context for T2I models. To bridge this gap, we propose Qwen-Image-Agent, a unified agentic framework that integrates plan, reason, search, memory and feedback in a context-centric manner. Qwen-Image-
items.title_cn: Qwen-Image-Agent：弥合真实世界图像生成中的上下文差距
items.note: 提出智能体框架解决图像生成中上下文不足问题，展示AI与知识结合，值得关注。

items.title_en: The Verification Horizon: No Silver Bullet for Coding Agent Rewards
items.summary: A classical intuition holds that verifying a solution is easier than producing one. For today's coding agents, this intuition is being inverted: as foundation models develop stronger reasoning capabilities and engineering harnesses grow more sophisticated, generating complex candidate solutions is no longer difficult -- reliably verifying them has become the harder problem. Every verifier we can build is only a proxy for human intent, never the intent itself. This makes verification subject to a
items.title_cn: 验证视野：编程智能体奖励没有银弹
items.note: 讨论编程智能体中验证比生成更难的问题，对理解AI开发挑战有帮助。

items.title_en: Are We Ready For An Agent-Native Memory System?
items.summary: Memory for large language model (LLM) agents has rapidly evolved from simple retrieval-augmented mechanisms into a data management system that supports persistent information storage, retrieval, update, consolidation, and dynamic lifecycle governance throughout agent execution. Despite this evolution, existing evaluations still benchmark agent memory mainly through end-to-end task success metrics (e.g., F1, BLEU), while treating the underlying system as a monolithic black box. As a result, criti
items.title_cn: 我们准备好迎接智能体原生记忆系统了吗？
items.note: 评估智能体记忆系统，强调需要更细粒度的评估，对AI记忆研究有兴趣可看。

items.title_en: Wan-Streamer v0.1: End-to-end Real-time Interactive Foundation Models
items.summary: We present Wan-Streamer, a native-streaming, end-to-end interactive foundation model designed from the ground up for real-time, low-latency, full-duplex audio-visual interaction. Wan-Streamer seamlessly models language, audio, and video as both input and output within a single Transformer, where the sequence is represented as interleaved visual, audio, and text input tokens together with visual, audio, and text output tokens, coordinated by block-causal attention for incremental streaming. Unlik
items.title_cn: Wan-Streamer v0.1：端到端实时交互基础模型
items.note: 提出实时音视频交互模型，展示多模态AI进展，适合关注前沿应用的新手。

items.title_en: DomainShuttle: Freeform Open Domain Subject-driven Text-to-video Generation
items.summary: Open domain subject-driven text-to-video (S2V) generation has drawn significant interest in academia and industry. Open domain S2V mainly involves two scenarios: in-domain, which requires retaining the reference subject features as much as possible, and cross-domain, which preserves the intrinsic features of the subject while allowing subject-irrelevant properties to vary flexibly according to the text prompt. Existing methods primarily focus on maximizing subject fidelity in in-domain scenarios
items.title_cn: DomainShuttle：自由形式开放域主题驱动文本到视频生成
items.note: 解决主题驱动视频生成中域内和跨域问题，对视频生成技术感兴趣可了解。

items.title_en: ShutterMuse: Capture-Time Photography Guidance with MLLMs
items.summary: Real-world photography requires capture-time guidance for both camera framing and subject pose. Yet existing aesthetic cropping benchmarks mainly evaluate post-hoc crop prediction and overlook subject-side recommendations, leaving the capture-time guidance capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce CaptureGuide-Bench, a benchmark with two complementary tasks: photographer-side composition decision and refinement, and subject-side sce
items.title_cn: ShutterMuse：基于MLLM的拍摄时摄影指导
items.note: 用多模态大模型提供实时摄影建议，展示AI在创意领域的应用，了解个大概即可。

items.title_en: Improved Large Language Diffusion Models
items.summary: Modern large language models are predominantly trained with autoregressive factorization and causal attention. We present iLLaDA, an 8B masked diffusion language model trained from scratch with fully bidirectional attention. iLLaDA keeps the masked diffusion objective throughout pre-training and supervised fine-tuning (SFT), scaling pre-training to 12T tokens and fine-tuning on a 25B-token instruction corpus for 12 epochs. We further use variable-length generation for efficiency and introduce co
items.title_cn: 改进的大型语言扩散模型
items.note: 提出双向注意力的扩散语言模型，挑战自回归范式，对模型架构创新有兴趣可看。

items.title_en: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
items.summary: A world model predicts environment dynamics based on current observations and actions, serving as a core cognitive mechanism for reasoning and planning. In this work, we investigate how world modeling based on language models can further push the boundaries of general agents. (i) We first focus on building foundation models for agentic environment simulation. We introduce Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B and Qwen-AgentWorld-397B-A17B, the first language world models capable of simulating agentic environm
items.title_cn: Qwen-AgentWorld：通用智能体的语言世界模型
items.note: 构建语言世界模型模拟智能体环境，推动通用智能体发展，值得关注。

items.title_en: NatureBench: Can Coding Agents Match the Published SOTA of Nature-Family Papers?
items.summary: We introduce NatureBench, a cross-discipline benchmark of 90 tasks distilled from peer-reviewed Nature-family publications, designed to evaluate whether AI coding agents can move beyond reproduction toward discovery on real scientific problems. NatureBench is built on NatureGym, an automated pipeline that constructs a standardized, per-task containerized environment from a source paper, addressing the environment-fragmentation problem that has limited the credibility of prior agent-on-research b
items.title_cn: NatureBench：编程智能体能达到Nature系列论文的SOTA吗？
items.note: 评估AI在科学发现中的能力，对AI+科学交叉感兴趣可了解。

items.title_en: Escaping the Self-Confirmation Trap: An Execute-Distill-Verify Paradigm for Agentic Experience Learning
items.summary: Experience-driven self-evolution is critical for large language model (LLM) agents to improve through open-world interaction. However, existing experience learning methods mostly rely on single-agent loops, where the same agent executes tasks, summarizes outcomes, and determines memory content. This setup makes agents vulnerable to the Self-Confirmation Trap: wrong-but-self-consistent trajectories are misidentified as successful experience, leading to cumulative errors during retrieval and reuse
items.title_cn: 逃离自我确认陷阱：智能体经验学习的执行-蒸馏-验证范式
items.note: 提出新范式避免智能体学习中的错误积累，对智能体自我改进有帮助。

items.title_en: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
items.summary: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct
items.title_cn: OpenThoughts-Agent：智能体模型的数据配方
items.note: 公开训练通用智能体的数据流程，对想了解智能体训练的新手有价值。

items.title_en: MobileForge: Annotation-Free Adaptation for Mobile GUI Agents with Hierarchical Feedback-Guided Policy Optimization
items.summary: MLLM-based mobile GUI agents have made substantial progress in UI understanding and action execution, but adapting them to real target apps remains costly because mobile apps are numerous, frequently updated, and hard to cover with human-written tasks, demonstrations, or reward labels. Existing annotation-free GUI learning reduces manual supervision, yet lacks a unified substrate connecting target-app exploration, curriculum mining, rollout execution, and feedback, while policy optimization ofte
items.title_cn: MobileForge：基于分层反馈策略优化的移动GUI智能体无标注适应
items.note: 无需标注即可适应新移动应用，展示AI在移动端的应用，了解个大概即可。

items.title_en: PlanBench-XL: Evaluating Long-Horizon Planning of LLM Tool-Use Agents in Large-Scale Tool Ecosystems
items.summary: LLM agents increasingly operate in large tool ecosystems, where real-world tasks require discovering relevant tools, inferring implicit sub-goals, and adapting to dynamic environments over long horizons. However, existing benchmarks rarely evaluate planning under retrieval-limited tool visibility. To address this gap, we introduce PlanBench-XL, an interactive benchmark of 327 retail tasks over 1,665 tools that tests whether agents can iteratively retrieve usable tools, invoke them to uncover int
items.title_cn: PlanBench-XL：大规模工具生态中LLM工具使用智能体的长程规划评估
items.note: 评估智能体在大量工具中的规划能力，对理解AI工具使用有帮助。

items.title_en: EnterpriseClawBench: Benchmarking Agents from Real Workplace Sessions
items.summary: Enterprise agents increasingly operate inside workspaces: they read heterogeneous files, invoke tools, and deliver business artifacts. We introduce EnterpriseClawBench, an enterprise agent benchmark constructed from proprietary, real-world agent sessions. Starting from a large archive of workplace sessions, the EnterpriseClawBench produces 852 reproducible tasks, each paired with recovered fixtures, rewritten prompts, role classes, skill subclasses, hard rules, and semantic rubrics. Because the
items.title_cn: EnterpriseClawBench：从真实工作会话中基准测试智能体
items.note: 基于真实企业工作流构建智能体基准，对AI在商业应用中有参考价值。

items.title_en: OpenRath: Session-Centered Runtime State for Agent Systems
items.summary: Modern agent systems often suffer from fragmented runtime state: transcripts, tool effects, memory events, workspace placement, branch provenance, and replay evidence are recorded separately and become difficult to inspect or reproduce. OpenRath addresses this issue with a PyTorch-like programming model for multi-agent, multi-session systems. The analogy concerns the role of a central first-class runtime abstraction, not tensor computation. Its core abstraction is Session, the runtime value pass
items.title_cn: OpenRath：面向智能体系统的会话中心运行时状态
items.note: 提出统一运行时状态管理框架，对智能体系统设计有兴趣可了解。

items.title_en: Grouped Query Experts: Mixture-of-Experts on GQA Self-Attention
items.summary: Self-attention is central to Transformer performance and is often the most expensive part of the Transformer at long context lengths because its pairwise token interactions scale quadratically with sequence length. Standard dense attention also applies the same set of attention heads to every token regardless of token difficulty or information content. This uniform activation can waste compute, especially as sequences grow longer and attention cost increases rapidly. We propose Grouped Query Exp
items.title_cn: 分组查询专家：GQA自注意力上的混合专家
items.note: 通过混合专家机制优化自注意力计算，提升效率，对模型加速有帮助。

items.title_en: DataClaw0: Agentic Tailoring Multimodal Data from Raw Streams
items.summary: Massive unstructured multimodal streams suffer from high "data entropy," impeding both efficient human knowledge acquisition and high-quality AI post-training. Existing passive annotation paradigms, heavily reliant on heuristic rules or general VLMs, are costly, monotonous, and fail to unlock the deep procedural logic embedded in raw data. We elevate data processing to a learnable capability, proposing a paradigm shift towards Agentic Data Tailoring, which actively refining and structuring data
items.title_cn: DataClaw0：从原始流中智能定制多模态数据
items.note: 提出主动数据定制范式，提升数据处理效率，对数据工程感兴趣可看。

items.title_en: MemSlides: A Hierarchical Memory Driven Agent Framework for Personalized Slide Generation with Multi-turn Local Revision
items.summary: Personalized presentation generation requires more than conditioning on a current prompt or template: agents must preserve stable user preferences across tasks, retain newly introduced preferences and constraints during multi-turn revision, and carry out local edits reliably. We propose MemSlides, a hierarchical memory framework for personalized presentation agents that separates long-term memory from working memory and further divides long-term memory into user profile memory and tool memory. U
items.title_cn: MemSlides：基于分层记忆驱动的智能体框架用于个性化幻灯片生成
items.note: 通过分层记忆实现个性化幻灯片生成，展示AI在办公场景的应用。

items.title_en: PerceptionDLM: Parallel Region Perception with Multimodal Diffusion Language Models
items.summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in visual understanding tasks. However, most existing MLLMs rely on autoregressive generation, which limits their efficiency for perception tasks that require captioning multiple regions. In this work, we propose PerceptionDLM, a multimodal diffusion language model optimized for efficient parallel region perception. Built upon PerceptionDLM-Base, a strong foundational baseline that achieves state-of-the-art performance am
items.title_cn: PerceptionDLM：多模态扩散语言模型的并行区域感知
items.note: 提出并行区域感知的扩散语言模型，提升多模态理解效率，值得关注。

items.title_en: MCompassRAG: Topic Metadata as a Semantic Compass for Paragraph-Level Retrieval
items.summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems depend critically on how documents are chunked and searched. Fine-grained chunks can improve retrieval precision but expand the search space, increasing latency and cost; larger chunks reduce the number of candidates but make dense similarity less reliable, as the representation for each chunk mixes multiple topics and introduces more semantic noise. This trade-off becomes especially limiting in deep research tasks, where retrieval must be both fast a
items.title_cn: MCompassRAG：主题元数据作为段落级检索的语义指南针
items.note: 通过主题元数据改进RAG检索精度，对了解RAG技术有帮助。

items.title_en: SproutRAG: Attention-Guided Tree Search with Progressive Embeddings for Long-Document RAG
items.summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems must balance retrieval granularity with contextual coherence, a challenge that existing methods address through LLM-guided chunking, single-level context expansion, or hierarchical summarization. These approaches variously depend on costly LLM calls during indexing or retrieval, limit context aggregation to a single granularity level, or introduce information loss through summarization. We present SproutRAG, an attention-guided hierarchical RAG framew
items.title_cn: SproutRAG：注意力引导的树搜索与渐进嵌入用于长文档RAG
items.note: 提出分层RAG框架平衡检索粒度与上下文，适合关注长文档处理的新手。

items.title_en: GateMem: Benchmarking Memory Governance in Multi-Principal Shared-Memory Agents
items.summary: Memory benchmarks for LLM agents largely assume single-user settings, leaving shared assistants for hospitals, workplaces, campuses, and households understudied. In these deployments, multiple principals write to a common memory pool and query it under different roles, scopes, and relationships, so memory quality requires governance as well as recall. We introduce GateMem, a benchmark for multi-principal shared-memory agents. GateMem jointly evaluates utility for legitimate long-horizon requests
items.title_cn: GateMem：多主体共享记忆智能体的记忆治理基准
items.note: 评估多用户共享记忆场景下的记忆治理，对AI在协作场景应用有参考价值。

huggingface.models_summary: 这些热门模型反映出AI正从单一文本生成向多模态（图片+文字）、智能体（自主执行任务）发展，且模型越来越大（如350亿参数）。对于想跟进AI圈和备考的人，要注意：多模态能力是趋势，比如OCR和图文理解；智能体模型（如Qwen-AgentWorld）代表未来方向，能自动完成复杂任务；同时，大模型（如Ornith-1.0-35B）性能更强但资源消耗大，备考时需理解其原理和局限。
huggingface.papers_summary: 这批论文集中在智能体（Agent）的多个方面：如何让智能体更自主（中止决策、长程规划、记忆管理）、更高效（模型压缩、架构创新）、更实用（机器人操作、视频编辑、图像生成、企业应用）。同时，强化学习、扩散模型、RAG技术仍是热点。备考新手应记住关键词：智能体、世界模型、强化学习、扩散模型、RAG、记忆系统、多模态。
